title: MoreStrongholds
description: This mod fills your world with strongholds, all the way to the world border.
body: This mod completely fills your world with more Strongholds, all the way to the world border. After the initial 128 vanilla strongholds that generate up to 25 thousand blocks out, the extended strongholds will randomly generate at 4000 blocks apart on average. This mod works fully serverside and even works on existing worlds, strongholds will just only generate in chunks that haven't been loaded before. --- [](https://discord.com/invite/jpFJG8dujR) [](https://ko-fi.com/kasetoatz) [](https://paypal.me/KaasToast) Looking for a fun place to play Minecraft and try out some of my mods? Come hang out on the El Basurero SMP! - **IP:** `play.ebsmp.com` - **Recommended Version:** 26.1.2 (other versions work too!) - **Bedrock Edition:** Supported - **Bonus:** Test out most of my server-side mods live in-game! For more info check the [docs](https://ebsmp.com/)!
